mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in industrial production signals a strengthening supply chain that supports higher corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in strengthening supply periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the unemployment rate signals a tightening labor market that compresses wage growth and supports positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in tightening labor periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in housing starts signals a strengthening demand for residential construction that supports positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in strengthening demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the federal funds rate and a 3-month increase in industrial production signal a strengthening monetary-supply cycle that supports positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in strengthening monetary-supply periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the unemployment rate and a 3-month increase in housing starts signal a tightening labor-demand cycle that supports positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening labor-demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in real GDP and a 3-month increase in industrial production signal a strengthening demand-supply cycle that supports positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 rises > 0.5% in 3 months and INDPRO rises > 0.5% in 3 months
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in strengthening demand-supply periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the federal funds rate and a 3-month increase in real GDP signal a strengthening monetary-demand cycle that supports positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS falls below 3.5% in 3 months and GDPC1 rises > 0.5% in 3 months
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in strengthening monetary-demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
